salary.title: 2026 APAC Cybersecurity Salary Explorer
salary.standfirst: Verified salary ranges across six APAC markets, six roles, and three experience levels. Sourced from public job boards, government workforce reports, and industry surveys — updated quarterly.
salary.noResults: No roles match your filters. Try a different market or role.
salary.certTableTitle: Certification ROI: cost vs. salary boost
salary.certTableStandfirst: Head-to-head comparisons of the certs that actually move salaries in this region. Cost figures are official exam fees; boosts come from market wage data.
salary.methodologyP1: Salary ranges represent the 25th–75th percentile of public job listings combined with verified candidate compensation data, expressed in source-country annual currency.
salary.methodologyP2: Markets are bucketed by major hiring center (e.g. China T1 = Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen). Cross-market comparisons normalize to USD using April 2026 reference rates.
salary.methodologyP3: Source attribution is included on every record. Where a single source is named, the figure was triangulated against at least one secondary source before publication.
salary.newsletterDesc: We refresh this dataset every quarter and add new markets as we cover them. No spam — one email per release.
salary.heroCeilingDesc: Top of market for the senior tier across the dataset.
salary.heroEntryDesc: Best entry-level base salary for a 0-2 year analyst.
salary.heroSpreadDesc: How much the senior median changes across markets.
salary.mapStandfirst: Senior-band median (USD equivalent) across six APAC markets. Bigger dot = higher senior pay. Click a city to filter the cards below.
